testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01Center layoutUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal.kitaboo. com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
